source_jobs.title: Campaign Manager, Spanish-Speaking, Europe (Freelance)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

As Campaign Manager, you’ll be the engine that powers Kyra’s creator campaigns from start to finish. You’ll manage day-to-day campaign delivery, ensuring that everything runs on time, on budget, and to the highest creative standard. From briefing creators to reporting back to clients, you’ll bring structure, energy, and problem-solving to every campaign you touch.




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

📋 Campaign Management

 - Own day-to-day management of influencer marketing campaigns across multiple brands

 - Oversee campaign timelines, budgets, deliverables, and approvals

 - Be the main point of contact for creators, clients, and internal teams

🎯 Client Service

 - Build trusted relationships with clients by delivering clear, proactive communication

 - Anticipate client needs and ensure campaigns exceed expectations

🤝 Creator Collaboration

 - Source, brief, and manage creators throughout campaign lifecycles

 - Ensure content meets brand guidelines, cultural nuance, and campaign objectives

📊 Reporting & Optimisation

 - Track campaign performance using Kyra’s proprietary platform and analytics tools

 - Provide actionable insights and recommendations for future campaigns




WHAT YOU BRING

📐 Experience & Skills

 - 3-4 yrs experience in influencer marketing, talent management, or campaign/project management ideally working with fashion brands.

 - Negotiation experience w/ creators

 - UGC marketing techniques

 - Experience engaging Macro to Micro creators and understanding creator verticals

 - Creator contracting experience

 - Strong written-communication skills

 - You're a hands-on self-starter expected to take full ownership of the project.

 - Strong organisational prioritizations skills with the ability to juggle multiple projects at speed

 - Confident communicator who can manage stakeholders with ease

 - Experience integrating AI into your work flow.



🌍 Industry Knowledge

 - Strong cultural competency and knowledge of trends for UK/Europe market

 - Understanding of social media platforms, creator culture, and digital marketing

 - Passion for the creator economy and emerging cultural trends



🔥 Mindset & Drive

 - Proactive problem-solver who thrives in a fast-paced environment

 - Collaborative, adaptable, and committed to high standards



📩 Sound like you?

We’d love to hear from campaign managers who are ready to step up and deliver impactful creator marketing at scale.



AI is core to how we operate. Use it to elevate your work. But everything in your application should reflect your own judgement and experience.



💟 Support

If you have a condition or require an adjustment to our interview process - please let us know so we can make adjustments to support you. Please note that when you submit an application or resume, your data will be processed in line with our privacy policy https://www.bamboohr.com/legal/privacy-policy.

source_jobs.title: Join Our Talent Pool
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

Join our Talent Pool


Kyra · Global · Full-time

Kyra sits where creators and brands meet. One side of the business runs influencer campaigns end to end. The other builds our subscription product, the platform behind them. Both are growing fast, which is where you come in.

Don't see a role that fits right now? If you'd still like to build with us down the line, join our Talent Pool.

This is a big year for us. We're hiring across the business as both sides scale. Most of our roles are London-based and need existing UK right to work, but we also hire across the US and Europe, and some roles can sit anywhere. The Talent Pool is how we keep track of brilliant people before those roles go live.


We hire across:

 - Product and Engineering

 - Sales

 - Client Success

 - Campaign Management

 - Strategy

 - Marketing / Growth

 - Paid Media

 - Project Management

 - Operations, including Finance, Legal, and People and Recruitment

 - To be defined - you think we're missing a role, and you've got the idea for it
   

What's a Talent Pool?

It's a group of people who want to register their interest in joining Kyra in the future. It keeps us in touch with you for new roles, hiring events, and everything else going on here.


How does it work?

It's our first stop when we start hiring. We search the pool and reach out to relevant people before we advertise a role anywhere else. Anyone can join, whatever your experience or background. We do the filtering on our side.


So I'll hear about new Kyra roles first?

Often, yes. We go to the Talent Pool before we open a role up publicly.


I don't work in one of those teams, can I still apply to join?

Yes. The pool is for every function and every level. Join once and we'll get in touch when we have something that fits.

How do I join?

Submit your CV below. We'll take it from there and reach out when we have something that fits.

💟 Support

If you have a condition or require an adjustment to our interview process - please let us know so we can make adjustments to support you. Please note that when you submit an application or resume, your data will be processed in line with our privacy policy https://www.bamboohr.com/legal/privacy-policy.

source_jobs.title: Junior Seeding Campaign Manager (6 Month FTC / Freelance)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.



Location: Remote
Engagement: Freelance contract
Contract: Fixed-Term (6 Months)
Start Date: Immediate
Working Schedule: Available during core campaign hours, approximately 9am-6pm CEST. Candidates based within one hour of CET are preferred.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a Junior Campaign Manager (Seeding) to work with our team on an immediate basis for an initial six-month fixed-term contract.

In this role, you'll support the delivery of product seeding and creator gifting campaigns for some of the world's leading consumer brands.

Your focus will be identifying the right creators, coordinating outreach, managing product shipments, and ensuring campaigns run smoothly from planning through to reporting. You'll work closely with Campaign Managers, Creator Managers and Client Solutions teams to generate authentic creator content and build long-term creator relationships.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone with around 1–2 years' experience in influencer marketing, PR, social media or digital marketing who is highly organised, proactive and passionate about the creator economy.

This is a freelance engagement. You'll invoice monthly at an agreed day rate, be responsible for your own tax arrangements. The initial engagement is six months with potential to extend based on campaign demand.




WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING


CREATOR RESEARCH & SELECTION

 - Research and identify creators that align with client objectives, audience and brand values.

 - Build creator shortlists using internal tools and external platforms.

 - Review creator content, engagement and audience quality.

 - Maintain accurate creator records and campaign databases.


CREATOR OUTREACH & RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT

 - Coordinate creator outreach via email, social platforms and creator tools.

 - Support negotiations around gifting, usage rights and campaign participation.

 - Manage creator communications throughout the campaign lifecycle.

 - Build positive relationships that encourage future collaboration.


PRODUCT SEEDING & LOGISTICS

 - Coordinate product gifting and shipment with internal teams and fulfilment partners.

 - Ensure accurate shipping information and delivery tracking.

 - Monitor product dispatches and resolve delivery issues where required.

 - Keep campaign trackers updated with shipment and creator status.


CAMPAIGN DELIVERY

 - Support Campaign Managers with day-to-day campaign execution.

 - Track creator deliverables and ensure content is submitted on time.

 - Monitor campaign timelines and proactively flag risks or delays.

 - Help ensure all campaign documentation is accurate and up to date.


REPORTING & ADMINISTRATION

 - Track creator participation and content delivery.

 - Compile campaign reports using performance and engagement data.

 - Maintain campaign trackers, budgets and status documents.

 - Support post-campaign reporting and internal retrospectives.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Available to start immediately.

 - Approximately 1–2 years' experience in influencer marketing, creator marketing, PR, social media or digital marketing.

 - Excellent organisational skills with strong attention to detail.

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills.

 - Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

 - A proactive, solutions-focused mindset.

 - Experience using project management tools such as Asana or similar is an advantage.

 - Proficiency with Google Workspace and Microsoft Office.

 - A genuine passion for social media, creators and digital culture.

 - Fluency in English is essential. Professional proficiency in either Spanish or German is highly desirable.

source_jobs.title: Senior Campaign Manager (US based)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.



As a Senior Campaign Manager at Kyra, you are the operator who turns creator campaigns into results. You own delivery end to end across a roster of ambitious brands, from fast-moving consumer names to category-defining tech, and you keep every campaign on time, on budget, and on target.

You sit between clients and creators, holding both to a high standard while keeping the commercial maths working in the background. Kyra's proprietary platform is your home base: you run everything through it, and the insights you generate feed back into the product as much as the product shapes your work. If you think in CPVs, find the insight others miss in the data, and get a kick out of a campaign that beats its KPIs, this is your seat.


What You'll Be Doing

📋 Campaign Management and Delivery

 - Own day-to-day delivery of multiple influencer campaigns at once, across several brands

 - Run timelines, budgets, deliverables, and approvals so nothing slips

 - Act as the single point of contact for creators, clients, and internal teams

 - Hold cross-functional team members accountable to deadlines and deliverables, without direct authority over them

 - Stay ahead of problems and keep every stakeholder aligned, rather than firefighting



💷 Commercial and Pricing

 - Build creator pricing from the ground up using CPV (cost per view) and projected performance

 - Negotiate creator fees against budget and target CPV, protecting both the campaign outcome and the margin

 - Proactively negotiate added-value assets and maximise the value on every deal

 - Manage campaign budgets line by line, model scenarios, and flag commercial risk early

 - Treat every campaign as a commercial unit, not just a creative one



🎯 Client Service and Retention

 - Build trusted relationships through clear, proactive, no-surprises communication

 - Read each client's style and match it, from polished weekly reporting to fast informal updates

 - Anticipate client needs, surface insight, and create the conditions for renewal and growth



🤝 Casting and Creator Management

 - Build casting shortlists and identify creator-fit based on client archetype, campaign goals, and creator vertical

 - Source, brief, and manage creators across the full campaign lifecycle, leading all creator communications and fielding

 - Make sure content lands on brand guidelines, cultural nuance, and campaign objectives

 - Handle creator contracting, usage rights, and disclosure compliance cleanly



📊 Reporting, Performance, and Optimisation

 - Track performance against the numbers that matter: CPV, reach, engagement, and conversion

 - Use Kyra's proprietary platform and analytics tools to monitor campaigns in flight, not just at wrap

 - Keep Kyra as the single source of truth, with all updates, creator comms, and status reflected in-platform rather than in private spreadsheets

 - Flag data inconsistencies and workflow gaps early

 - Turn data into clear, actionable recommendations clients can act on, with reliable daily reporting



🤖 Platform, AI, and Ways of Working

 - Live in Kyra's proprietary platform as a power user, running campaigns end to end inside the tech rather than around it

 - Generate the campaign insights that shape the product, and put the platform's outputs to work in how you run accounts: a genuine two-way loop between you and the tech

 - Use AI daily to move faster and raise the quality of your work

 - Adopt new tools quickly and improve workflows on Kyra's AI-native platform

 - Bring a willingness to experiment. This is paying off across the team and we want people who lean in



What You Bring

🔑 Non-Negotiables

 - Agency experience

source_jobs.title: Senior Client Solutions Manager, Influencer Marketing (Remote - US, EST hours)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

💡 The role in a nutshell

You own a portfolio of Kyra's largest enterprise accounts (multi-million-dollar brand partnerships) and you're measured on whether they grow. Retention, expansion, and Net Revenue Retention are your scoreboard.


💡 What You'll Own

This is a commercial role, not a delivery one. You keep enterprise clients, grow them, and run delivery cleanly enough that growth is never at risk.

 - Revenue. You carry an NRR target across your book. You protect it, and you grow it.

 - The relationship. You're the trusted strategic partner to senior brand-side stakeholders, not the campaign contact.

 - The system. You're the connective tissue between Sales, Strategy, Campaigns, Paid, and Product, and you keep them aligned and operating efficiently.

 - The early warning. When something drifts (performance, scope, relationship, or margin) you see it two quarters out and fix it before it becomes a problem. No surprises. No scrambling. Just steady, commercial ownership.

 - The standard. You lead a pod of CSMs and/or Junior CSMs. Their performance and their client work is yours to elevate.
   

🎯 Lead the Relationship

Own client relationships across launches, seasonal campaigns, and always-on programs. Multi-thread across teams. Build trust. Have direct conversations when performance needs to improve.


📈 Turn Insight into Strategy

Translate data into clear, actionable plans. Present performance against KPIs (engagement, EMV, sales lift, affiliate impact) and explain what it means.

🤖 AI-First
You'll be expected to use AI daily to compress reporting, model renewals, prep upsells, and synthesise client data, so you can buy back time for the things that add value, like managing the relationship.


🔍 Own Delivery End-to-End

Manage timelines, scopes, budgets, and execution across seeding, paid, and integrated campaigns. Keep work on-brand, on-time, and within margin.


📊 Protect & Grow Revenue

Manage renewal timelines. Identify upsell opportunities. Drive Net Revenue Retention. Be able to speak confidently about account growth with real numbers.


💾 Use Data to Improve What's Next

Forecast performance. Optimise mid-campaign. Apply learnings to the next program. Reporting informs decisions; it's not a recap.


🛡️ Keep the System Tight

Keep tracking clean. Watch team capacity. Fix what's inefficient. Make sure client feedback doesn't get lost.


What We're Looking For

 - We're looking for someone who has:

 - 6+ years in influencer or creator marketing, with real time on large or enterprise accounts

 - Hands-on campaign fluency, with genuine command of Meta and TikTok

 - A track record of account growth and retention you can quantify, so bring the numbers

 - You've been measured against revenue, retention, or NRR before, and you know what moved them

 - Direct people-leadership experience. You've run 1:1s, managed workload, and lifted the performance of people you're responsible for

 - AI-native. You build AI tools into your daily work for faster execution, sharper insight, and smarter workflows

 - You should be commercially sharp, operationally reliable, and able to speak confidently about the revenue impact of the accounts you've managed.
   

Traits That Matter

Curious. Commercially aware. Direct. Adaptable. Strong at building trust. Open to feedback. You don't avoid hard conversations. You don't wait for issues to escalate. You don't need constant direction.


What Success Looks Like

6 months in: renewals are planned early, NRR targets are on track, expansion opportunities are clearly mapped, delivery runs smoothly, and leadership trusts your forecast.


Benefits

🌎 Remote-first, so you can w

source_jobs.title: Senior Client Success Manager - Influencer Marketing (6 Month FTC) | UK
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.


📍London (Hybrid) | 6-month Fixed-Term Contract
💰 Competitive, dependent on experience

The Opportunity

You will be the day-to-day owner of one of Kyra's largest and most complex global enterprise accounts: a fast-moving, multi-category consumer brand with 12+ sub-brands, 35+ active stakeholders, and campaigns running simultaneously across multiple regions.

Your job is to keep delivery tight, keep the client happy, and be a safe pair of hands on a flagship account. This is not about growing or expanding the account. The commercial relationship is locked in. The job is world-class servicing at enterprise scale.


What you'll do:

 - Own the global account relationship across 12+ sub-brands and multiple regions. Stay organised across a volume of comms, briefs, and stakeholders that is genuinely unusual.

 - Orchestrate cross-functional teams: creative, paid media, creator partnerships, and product. You are the connective tissue. If something drifts, you see it early and fix it.

 - If something drifts (performance, scope, relationship, or timeline) you see it early and fix it. No surprises. Steady, organised ownership.


🎯 Lead the Relationship Own client relationships across product launches, seasonal campaigns, and always-on programmes. Multi-thread across their teams. Build trust at every level. Have direct conversations when performance needs to improve.


📈 Turn Insight into Strategy Translate campaign data into clear, executive-level recommendations using AI to move from raw numbers to narrative faster. Present performance against KPIs (engagement, EMV, sales lift, affiliate impact) and explain what it means.


🔍 Own Delivery End-to-End Lead client onboarding for new briefs: build decks, verify SOW accuracy, coordinate internal teams, demo the platform. Manage timelines, scopes, budgets, and execution across our full product suite, including Always-On creator partnerships, Pulse campaigns, Makers (CGC), Amplify+ (paid boosting), Seeding+, and License+. With 6+ briefs running simultaneously, operational precision is everything. Keep work on-brand, on-time, and within margin.


📊 Protect & Grow Revenue Lead post-campaign analysis: run internal post-mortems, build PCA decks, present performance narratives. Own exec-ready reporting (QBRs/EBRs). Reporting should inform decisions, not just recap them.


🛡️ Keep the System Tight Keep tracking clean. Watch capacity. Fix what's inefficient. Make sure client feedback doesn't get lost. Feed client insights back into product development.

Feed Insight Back into Product Surface client needs, pain points, and feature requests back into the product team. You are the closest person to how the client actually uses the platform.

 

What We're Looking For

We're looking for someone who has:

 - 4–6+ years in influencer or creator marketing

 - Campaign execution experience. You have actually run creative marketing activations, not just managed client relationships from a distance.

 - Enterprise account servicing at scale. Multi-stakeholder, high-volume, complex. You have managed accounts with this many moving parts before.

 - Exceptional organisation. The volume of comms, briefs, regions, and stakeholders on this account is unusually high. Getting lost is easy. You don't get lost.

 - Self-starter with an entrepreneurial mindset. You take ownership of learning, build internal relationships proactively, and don't wait to be told what to do.

 - Strong hands-on campaign experience, with real fluency in TikTok.

 - AI fluency, applied. Our platform is AI-powered and you'll be expected to get up to speed fast and use it daily for client summaries, performance narratives, an

source_jobs.title: Senior Back End Engineer UK Based
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.




THE ROLE

We’re looking for a senior backend engineer with sharp product judgement. You’ll work alongside our engineering lead on a platform that processes millions of creator data points, runs real-time analytics, and powers AI-driven workflows.

This isn’t a “wait for a fully-scoped ticket” role. You’ll take ambiguous direction, make calls, and ship features end-to-end — including deploying them yourself. We have infra already; we need someone who can operate inside it confidently, not someone who wants to rebuild it.



WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO

• Build and maintain domain modules in a DDD-style Node.js/TypeScript monorepo.

• Take vague product direction, sharpen it into a real spec, and ship a v1 — then iterate.

• Design APIs, write docs, and manage database schemas and migrations.

• Build features that span our main transactional backend and a separate analytics backend running heavy queries over creator data.

• Write services that integrate with TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube APIs.

• Work with queue workers for background job processing (media analysis, outreach, data syncing).

• Deploy your own services to our cloud infrastructure, write the migrations, watch them go out safely.

• Investigate production issues when they touch your code — trace through the observability stack to find the cause.



REQUIRED — NON-NEGOTIABLE

• 6+ years backend development with Node.js and TypeScript in production.

• Product mindset — you’ve shipped features where the brief was a paragraph, not a ticket. You ask why before how, make calls when requirements are vague, and iterate after release. You’ve sat across from non-engineers and left with a sharper problem than you walked in with.

• Strong relational database experience — schema design, query optimisation, safe migrations at scale.

• Comfortable deploying and operating your own services on a major cloud provider — containers, CI/CD pipelines, the basics of running things in production. You don’t need to be an infra specialist, but you don’t need handholding either.

• Queue-based background job processing patterns.

• REST API design and documentation.

• Git workflow maturity — branching strategies, code review, migration safety. You understand why you don’t run destructive commands on a production migration.



STRONGLY PREFERRED

• Shipped AI features to production — you know what evals are for, why prompts regress, and why “it worked in testing” isn’t enough.

• Columnar / analytics databases for heavy aggregate queries.

• In-memory caching and session stores.

• DDD or domain-driven design — explicit module boundaries, repositories, services, event-driven patterns.

• Production observability — you’ve triaged real issues, not just configured dashboards.

• OAuth, OTP, or session-based auth systems in production.



NICE TO HAVE

• Social media platform APIs (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube).

• Search infrastructure for large datasets.

• Monorepo tooling and workflows.

• Side projects, OSS contributions, or tools you’ve built for yourself that other people now use — signal that you ship for the love of shipping.



WHAT THIS PERSON LOOKS LIKE

• Holds opinions and changes them fast — you’ll ship the wrong thing sometimes and replace it a week later. That’s the job.

• Debugs across boundaries — when a metric shows the wrong number, you can trace it from the frontend component through the API layer down to the database query and figure out where it breaks.

• Writes code that doesn’t need babysitting — proper validation, error handling, and patterns other team members can follow.

• Communicates proactively — posts in Slack when deploying, writes migrati

source_jobs.title: Campaign Manager, Europe (Freelance)

source_jobs.title: Senior Client Solutions Manager, Influencer Marketing UK
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

The Opportunity

You will be the day-to-day owner of one of Kyra's largest and most complex global enterprise accounts: a fast-moving, multi-category consumer brand with 12+ sub-brands, 30+ active stakeholders, and campaigns running simultaneously across multiple regions. This is a high-volume, high-visibility account with multi-million dollar investment in creator marketing.

Your job is to keep delivery tight, keep the client happy, and be a safe pair of hands on a flagship account.

This role is about world-class servicing at enterprise scale.

📍London, United Kingdom
📍Reporting to Head of Client Solutions

What You'll Do

Own the Account Be the person the client trusts. Own the global relationship (excluding US) across 12+ sub-brands, each with its own team. Manage communications across 35+ stakeholders without dropping a thread. Stay organised at a level most people have never had to operate at.

Traits That Matter:
Proactive. Organised. Adaptable. Self-starting. Comfortable with ambiguity.

You do not wait for problems to land. You see them coming and act. You do not need rigid processes or hand-holding. Tools, product, and ways of working evolve constantly here, and you thrive on that, not resist it.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive (London Based)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.



🎯 The Opportunity

As a Enterprise Account Executive, you’ll play a critical role in expanding Kyra’s presence across diverse verticals. You’ll own the full sales cycle and help large-scale, sophisticated enterprise brands unlock the power of creator marketing through Kyra’s innovative solutions.

This is a highly strategic, consultative role for someone who understands how to navigate complex enterprise environments and pitch bold, creative, and performance-driven solutions.



🛠️ What You’ll Be Doing

 - Own and drive full-cycle sales: From prospecting to negotiation and close, you’ll lead enterprise-level conversations with national and global brands.

 - Build high-impact pipelines: Identify and pursue strategic opportunities in categories like fashion, luxury, beauty, tech, DTC, entertainment, CPG, and finance.

 - Tailor high-stakes proposals: Collaborate with Strategy, Product, and Campaigns teams to develop enterprise-ready proposals rooted in data, trends, and business outcomes.

 - Consultative selling: Uncover complex challenges across brand marketing, media, and growth teams—and position Kyra as the strategic solution.

 - Forecast and close: Own your revenue number, maintain accurate CRM records, and consistently meet or exceed sales targets.

 - Trend-aware strategy: Stay plugged into broader digital, creator economy, and media industry trends that shape enterprise buying behavior.

 - Cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with Strategy and Paid team to build compelling influencer marketing proposals, with Product team to leverage data within your sell and showcase our tech, with our Client Solutions to drive client retention and growth

 - Thought leadership: Represent Kyra at industry events, on calls, and in strategic forums as a trusted advisor to major brands.
   



✅ What We’re Looking For

 - 3–4 years experience in consultative or enterprise sales, ideally at an influencer marketing agency, influencer platform, or tech startup.

 - Proven success closing mid-to-large deals (£30k- £150k+) with enterprise marketing teams.

 - Understanding of creator/influencer marketing and paid media.

 - Strategic thinker with commercial acumen—able to connect brand needs to creative and performance-driven solutions.

 - Outstanding communication and storytelling skills—comfortable owning boardroom conversations.

 - Highly organized and accountable, with strong pipeline management habits (e.g., HubSpot or Salesforce).

 - A self-starter with a growth mindset and a bias toward action—especially in remote settings.

 - Collaborative and coachable—with a team-first mindset and ability to thrive in a fast-moving, high-performance culture.
   
   
   

💥 Bonus Points For

 - Natural tech/AI adopter - using AI in your day-to-day to streamline your workflow

 - Previous success scaling enterprise partnerships in a high-growth company



Benefits
🌴 Annual Time Off: 25 days PTO + bank holidays, 4 company-wide days off (Kyra Days), 3 wellness days, and paid sick leave each year
📚 Growth: Annual Learning & Development budget to invest in your skills.
💰 Rewards: Annual bonus scheme to recognise great work
🩺 Healthcare stipend for US-based team members



AI is core to how we operate. Use it to elevate your work. But everything in your application should reflect your own judgement and experience.



💟 Support

If you have a condition or require an adjustment to our interview process - please let us know so we can make adjustments to support you. Please note that when you submit an application or resume, your data will be processed in line with our privacy policy https://www.bamboohr.com/legal/privacy-polic

source_jobs.title: Senior Strategist (Strategic, Creative), UK Based
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.



As a Strategist at Kyra, you’ll lead the development of platform-native campaign strategies that combine creative storytelling with measurable brand impact.. You’ll own the strategic direction from pitch through to post-campaign, turning insights into bold creative concepts that resonate across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and beyond.

You’ll collaborate closely with Client Solutions, Campaign Management, Paid Media, and Business Development to deliver campaigns for two large enterprise accounts that are not only beautiful—but effective. This role is ideal for a beauty-savvy strategist who’s confident turning data into narrative, client goals into creative, and trends into opportunities.

Reporting to: Strategy Director




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

💡 Strategic Campaign Development

 - Handle the end-to-end development of campaign strategies—from audience profiling and creator casting logic to content formats, messaging, and performance KPIs

 - Work cross-functionally with internal teams to craft compelling platform-native campaign concepts that align with brand tone and commercial goals

 - Write high-quality briefs and strategic decks that inspire both clients and creators
   

📊 Insights, Data & Measurement Strategy

 - Define and refine measurement frameworks for success across CPV, ER, and platform-specific KPIs

 - Use first-party, platform, and audience data to inform targeting, creative direction, and optimisation

 - Partner with Paid Media and Client Solutions to interpret results and make strategic recommendations
   

🔍 Trend Forecasting & Cultural Analysis

 - Handle cultural listening, market research, and platform trend tracking within the beauty category

 - Translate emerging insights into actionable campaign ideas and brand opportunities

 - Support new business efforts by contributing trend insights and POVs for decks, pitches, and proposals
   

📞 Client Engagement & Strategic Advisory

 - Join client calls to present strategic recommendations and explain the “why” behind campaign decisions

 - Collaborate with Account and Campaign Leads to respond to briefs and evolve campaign strategy based on feedback

 - Act as the strategic lead across your client portfolio—building relationships rooted in value and clarity




WHAT YOU BRING

🔑 Strategy Experience in the Creator Space

 - 4–6 years in strategy, planning, insights, or branded content—ideally in a creator, beauty, or social-first brand

 - Experience implementing / using AI tools into your workflows.

 - Deep knowledge of platform behaviours, content formats, and the creator economy across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube
   

💄 TikTok Fluency

 - Deep understanding of TikTok culture, trend cycles, and platform-native audience behavior.

 - Able to translate brand identities into authentic, scroll-stopping creator content
   

📈 Data-Driven Thinking

 - Comfortable working with performance metrics, audience data, and platform insights

 - Ability to structure frameworks, make data actionable, and present performance narratives clearly
   

✍️ Creative & Commercial Acumen

 - Exceptional brief-writing, storytelling, and presentation skills

 - Strong client presence with the ability to articulate ideas confidently and drive strategy forward.



What Makes You Stand Out

 - A hybrid thinker who blends logic with creativity, intuition with structure

 - Experience owning strategy across multiple live campaigns and strategic touchpoints

 - Passion for beauty, social culture, and pushing the boundaries of what creator content can do




BENEFITS

🌎 We’re a remote-first team, giving you the flexibility to work from wherever you do your best work

source_jobs.title: Campaign Manager, Beauty & Fashion Brands (Freelance)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.



As Campaign Manager, you’ll be the engine that powers Kyra’s creator campaigns from start to finish. You’ll manage day-to-day campaign delivery, ensuring that everything runs on time, on budget, and to the highest creative standard. From briefing creators to reporting back to clients, you’ll bring structure, energy, and problem-solving to every campaign you touch.




WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

📋 Campaign Management

 - Own day-to-day management of influencer marketing campaigns across multiple brands

 - Oversee campaign timelines, budgets, deliverables, and approvals

 - Be the main point of contact for creators, clients, and internal teams

🎯 Client Service

 - Build trusted relationships with clients by delivering clear, proactive communication

 - Anticipate client needs and ensure campaigns exceed expectations

🤝 Creator Collaboration

 - Source, brief, and manage creators throughout campaign lifecycles

 - Ensure content meets brand guidelines, cultural nuance, and campaign objectives

📊 Reporting & Optimisation

 - Track campaign performance using Kyra’s proprietary platform and analytics tools

 - Provide actionable insights and recommendations for future campaigns




WHAT YOU BRING

📐 Experience & Skills

 - 3-4 yrs experience in influencer marketing, talent management, or campaign/project management ideally working with beauty, fashion or life style brands.

 - Negotiation experience w/ creators

 - Creator contracting experience

 - Strong written-communication skills

 - Ideally some client facing experience

 - Must be able to work US hours (EST/CT/PST)

 - Strong organisational prioritizations skills with the ability to juggle multiple projects at speed

 - Confident communicator who can manage stakeholders with ease



🌍 Industry Knowledge

 - Strong cultural competency and knowledge of trends for US market

 - Understanding of social media platforms, creator culture, and digital marketing

 - Passion for the creator economy and emerging cultural trends



🔥 Mindset & Drive

 - Proactive problem-solver who thrives in a fast-paced environment

 - Collaborative, adaptable, and committed to high standards



📩 Sound like you?

We’d love to hear from campaign managers who are ready to step up and deliver impactful creator marketing at scale.




BENEFITS

🌎 We’re a remote-first team, giving you the flexibility to work from wherever you do your best work
🌴 Annual Time Off: 25 days PTO + bank holidays, 4 company-wide days off (Kyra Days), 3 wellness days, and paid sick leave each year
📚 Growth: Annual Learning & Development budget to invest in your skills.
💰 Rewards: Annual bonus scheme to recognise great work
🩺 Healthcare stipend for US-based team members



AI is core to how we operate. Use it to elevate your work. But everything in your application should reflect your own judgement and experience.





💟 Support

If you have a condition or require an adjustment to our interview process - please let us know so we can make adjustments to support you. Please note that when you submit an application or resume, your data will be processed in line with our privacy policy https://www.bamboohr.com/legal/privacy-policy.

source_jobs.title: Paid Social Executive UK Based
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT KYRA

Kyra is an enterprise influencer marketing platform working with brands like SharkNinja, Coach, H&M, Ray-Ban, and Converse. Our platform manages the full lifecycle — creator discovery, campaign management, content review, payments, analytics, and AI-powered intelligence across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.



Run the day-to-day of paid social campaigns on TikTok and Instagram for some of the world’s biggest brands.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You’ll join our paid media team, reporting directly to the Director, Paid Media, who leads paid media at Kyra. This is a hands-on, in-platform role: while our paid media managers own client relationships, you’ll own the execution that keeps campaigns live, optimised, and reported on. It’s a great step for someone a year or two into their paid social career who wants exposure to bigger brands and budgets at an established agency. We’re open to both freelance and permanent arrangements for the right person.






WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Run day-to-day campaign execution across Meta (Instagram) and TikTok Ads Manager — building, launching, monitoring, and optimising paid social campaigns for major consumer brands.

 - Pull, clean, and shape campaign data into clear performance reports — spotting shifts in delivery or results before they become problems.

 - Build client-ready decks and performance summaries in partnership with our paid media managers.

 - Track pacing and budgets across live accounts so spend lands where it should, when it should.

 - Keep campaign hygiene tight — naming conventions, tracking setup, and QA before anything goes live.






WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 1–2 years of hands-on paid social experience, ideally at an agency.

 - Working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager — you’ve set up, optimised, and reported on live campaigns yourself.

 - Confidence with data — you’re comfortable in Excel or Google Sheets and can turn numbers into a clear takeaway.

 - Sharp attention to detail and the organisation to juggle multiple accounts at once.

 - UK-based, ideally in or around London — we’d love some regular office time together.

 - Strong deck-building skills in Google Slides, PowerPoint or Claude
   
   




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience running paid social for large consumer brands.

 - Familiarity with tracking and measurement basics — pixels, UTMs, attribution.

 - Client facing experience
   
   .
   
   


BENEFITS

🌎 We’re a remote-first team, giving you the flexibility to work from wherever you do your best work
🌴 Annual Time Off: 25 days PTO + bank holidays, 4 company-wide days off (Kyra Days), 3 wellness days, and paid sick leave each year
📚 Growth: Annual Learning & Development budget to invest in your skills.
💰 Rewards: Annual bonus scheme to recognise great work
🩺 Healthcare coverage for US-based team members

 

AI is core to how we operate. Use it to elevate your work. But everything in your application should reflect your own judgement and experience.



💟 Support

If you have a condition or require an adjustment to our interview process - please let us know so we can make adjustments to support you. Please note that when you submit an application or resume, your data will be processed in line with our privacy policy https://www.bamboohr.com/legal/privacy-policy.

notes: Influencer marketing platform with a strong focus on sales and client success roles, but also some engineering and creative positions.
